name: karpathy-skills
description: Claude Code tooling derived from Andrej Karpathy's publicly stated observations on working with LLM coding agents.

plugins.name: karpathy
plugins.description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's LLM-coding principles. /karpathy:audit reviews agent instruction files; /karpathy:diff reviews in-progress code changes before commit; /karpathy:refactor applies evidence-gated, behavior-preserving refactors; /karpathy:wiki creates and maintains a local repo knowledge base; /karpathy:update checks for and applies plugin updates.
